meta.title: Rejection of Clostridium putrificum and conservation of Clostridium botulinum and Clostridium sporogenes - Opinion 69: Judicial Commission of the International Committee on Systematic Bacteriology

abstractHtml: The Judicial Commission rejected the name Clostridium putrificum while conserving Clostridium botulinum for toxigenic strains and conserving Clostridium sporogenes for non-toxigenic strains.
